title: 'If you attempt to run...': US helicopter gunner warns ship near Iran port as 27 vessels returned — watch
summary_full: US forces released video of a helicopter gunner warning a cargo vessel to turn back from a restricted zone near Iranian ports, enforcing a maritime blockade. This action comes amid escalating tensions and disrupted shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, with both nations imposing restrictions.
